generated_oml:
instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingLivingLab
]

instance RoomTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control Systems (BCS) that collect real-time operational data (e.g., temperature)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RoomOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control Systems (BCS) that collect real-time operational data (e.g., occupancy)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoomOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomTemperatureSensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance RoomOccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RoomOccupancySensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance RoomTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data transmitted from Building Control Systems (BCS)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RoomOccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data transmitted from Building Control Systems (BCS)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoomOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance HeatingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) that execute control commands for heating adjustments"
]

instance CoolingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) that execute control commands for cooling adjustments"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) that execute control commands for lighting adjustments"
]

instance VentilationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS) that execute control commands for ventilation adjustments"
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models containing geometric, spatial, and functional building component data, enriched with sensor and actuator metadata for Building Control Systems (BCS), and middleware configuration for Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTool, EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance under various scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, AdjustHVACAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort adjustment based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effect management for building occupants"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectInsight, AdjustVentilationAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualModelInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for optimizing building energy consumption"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for maintaining visual comfort levels"
]

instance HealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for managing non-visual health effects"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from building performance simulations"
]

instance VisualModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from interactive 3D visualization"
]

instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC systems for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustVentilationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of ventilation for health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:DTEvolution [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering process starting from BIM models, validated and transformed into runtime artifacts via automated model-to-model and model-to-text transformations, with iterative evolution through reinforcement learning (e.g., BOREALIS project for adaptive lighting control)."
]

instance BuildingLivingLab : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RoomTemperatureSensor, RoomOccupancySensor, HeatingActuator, CoolingActuator, LightingActuator, VentilationController, BuildingBIMModel, BIMModelingTool, EclipseHono, Ditto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin (e.g., for HVAC or lighting) sent through Eclipse Hono and Ditto to actuators and controllers in the physical Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization of physical asset data with the digital twin for continuous monitoring and control, with data exchange occurring at the frequency of sensor updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture where components (sensors, actuators, services) are integrated via standardized extension points, with Eclipse Hono and Ditto acting as the central hub for bidirectional data exchange and management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "All building life cycle stages, including design, construction, operations, refurbishment, and adaptations, with the digital twin providing unified representation throughout."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess interoperability and architectural soundness of the twin's representation of the physical asset."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and the digital twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for semantic modeling and standardized extension points for service integration, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous systems in the AECO domain."
]
